name: Herb Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine fructose, salt, flour, baking powder, and herbs.
3. In a separate bowl, mix remaining ingredients: part-skim ricotta cheese, skim milk, commercial light sour cream, egg white, canola oil, and vanilla.
4. Create a well in the dry ingredients and pour the wet ingredients into the center of the well.
5. Mix until well blended. The dough will be similar to biscuit dough.
6. On a lightly floured surface, form the dough into a 14x2-inch loaf.
7. Transfer the loaf to a baking sheet sprayed with no-stick vegetable coating.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Cool at least 5 minutes before cutting.
Makes 16 servings, each containing approximately 100 calories, 15 grams carbohydrate, 3 grams fat, 3 milligrams cholesterol, 3 grams protein and 277 milligrams sodium.
